title: PARENT AND CHILD PLAYGROUPS - 211info
text: GRANTS PASS SCHOOL DISTRICT 7 PARENT AND CHILD PLAYGROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers community activities, parent workshops, library visits, story time, and exciting crafts to enriching field trips, informative Food Hero nutrition classes, and health and dental pre-screening services. 725 North East Dean Drive Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Children ages 3-5 years old Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-11am Email (541) 474-5709 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 474-5700 Main phone Main phone (541) 474-5709 Olivia Eskitgis Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Children's Play Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - READY FOR KINDERGARTEN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING WORKSHOPS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
